info.title: Aspose.Imaging Image Album Maker Micro Application for .NET
info.description: Aspose.Imaging Image Album Maker Micro Application allows you create and save the image album via the command line or add an image convert feature to your .NET application.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add reference to the MicroApps aPI to your project.

options.name: --project
options.description:
Path to the project project for the addition of the reference
to the MicroApps API.

options.name: --input
options.description: Required. Input images paths or urls.

options.name: --output
options.description: Required. Path to the image album.

options.name: --format
options.description:
Required. (Default: jpg) Output image format. Jpeg
is default value

options.name: --adjustment
options.description:
(Default: None) Page adjustment type. Allowed values
: None, Smallest, Biggest. Default value is None.

options.name: --max-width
options.description: Maximal width of the resulting page in pixels.

options.name: --max-height
options.description: Maximal height of the resulting page in pixels.

options.name: --background-color
options.description:
(Default: White) The background color of resulting
image. Could be set in using
https://reference.aspose.com/imaging/net/aspose.imag
ing/color/. Otherwise HTML HEX code expressions are
supported (#RRGGBB, #RGB, #RRGGBBAA, #RGBA), as well
as special color - transparent.
